title: Ecom Express Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Ecom Express Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Ecom Express Holdings Services family as a E-commerce Executive in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Ecom Express Holdings Services:
Ecom Express Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express Holdings Services!
